hero.description: Full height 100vh with background image. Black/Gold gradient overlay to ensure text readability.
hero.alignment: Left aligned text to create asymmetry.

stat_cards.description: Black cards with 1px dark charcoal border. Gold numbers with count-up animation. Hover effect reveals gold border.
stat_cards.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#1A1A1A] p-8 rounded-none md:rounded-lg

service_cards.description: Image background with heavy bottom gradient. Title in Archivo Black. On hover, the image scales slightly and a gold accent line appears.

pricing_cards.description: 4-tier column layout. The 'Elite' plan has a #D4AF37 border and a 'Best Value' absolute badge.

accordion.description: Minimalist borders. Question in Sora bold. Gold '+' icon that rotates 45deg on open.

hero.description: Trainer back view with gold text. Perfect for black/gold hero background.

gallery.description: Functional/CrossFit cage with rig, tires, punching bag
Women performing yoga in neon lit studio

business_info.name: Core Fitness Dindigul
business_info.address: Near Achutha School, Pushpamal Nagar, Dindigul, Tamil Nadu 624001

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion, lucide-react, react-countup, and react-icons.
Import Archivo Black and Sora from Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement the Hero section with the Trainer back view image. Use a heavy left-to-right black gradient overlay so the Archivo Black text is perfectly readable.
For the 'Why Choose Us' section, implement 4 cards using framer-motion's staggered animations and react-countup for the numbers.
Pricing cards should be 4 columns on desktop. The 'Elite' plan needs a distinct gold border (#D4AF37) and a glowing 'Best Value' absolute badge.
Implement the Gallery using a CSS columns masonry layout or CSS Grid with varying row spans. Ensure images have a hover effect that scales the image and adds a gold border.
Embed the Google Maps iframe directly in the contact section.
Inject LocalBusiness and FAQPage JSON-LD schemas in a <script type='application/ld+json'> tag within the React Helmet or head.
Footer must include the 'Ravex Solutions' credit linked to their site.
Ensure ALL interactive elements include descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #808080 without intention; tint with warm gold/charcoal. Our black is #000000 for pure background, and #0A0A0A for cards.
